UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem: Toni Young, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Citywide Property Management is present. Represented by Julie Van.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ryan Holmes is present.
Attorney Karen Kerner appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of October 15, 2018 is vacated. (501)
